title: koeleria cristata f. pubiculmis
intro: Koeleria cristata f. pubiculmis, also known as Hair-grass, is a subspecies of the Koeleria cristata plant, which is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata f. pubiculmis include its ability to relieve bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Koeleria cristata f. pubiculmis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
